title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same generate/chat/embed API surface.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLM, chat, or embedding backends.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-web)
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model; Docker one-liner deployment.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri desktop GUI for chatting with local Ollama models (macOS/Win/Linux).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Terminal UI (TUI) client for Ollama written in Rust; chat, manage models, view logs.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a local GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store; ready-to-hack Python repo.

title: ollama-agents
summary: Experimental framework for building agent swarms that run entirely on local Ollama models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# / .NET client library for Ollama; supports .NET 6+ and streaming chat.

title: ollama-swift
summary: Swift package for iOS/macOS apps to chat with local Ollama servers via Swift Concurrency.

title: ollama-kotlin
summary: Multiplatform Kotlin SDK (JVM/Android) for Ollama; coroutines + Ktor client.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Collection of Docker Compose stacks bundling Ollama with WebUI, Postgres, Qdrant, etc.

title: modelfile-hub
summary: Community-driven registry of custom Modelfiles (quantizations, system prompts, adapters).

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds a /ollama slash command to query local models securely.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial but idiomatic Rust crate for Ollama’s REST API; async tokio client.
